q: Which payment methods are growing fastest this month compared to last month? Show percentage growth.
sql: SELECT payment_method, COALESCE((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM transaction_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN amount ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM transaction_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - 1), 0) AS growth_percentage FROM silver_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 months') AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' AND payment_method IS NOT NULL AND amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY growth_percentage DESC;

q: Which 5 merchants have the highest refund rate? Show refund count and total transaction count.
sql: SELECT m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN st.transaction_id END) AS refund_count, COUNT(DISTINCT st.transaction_id) AS total_transaction_count, (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN st.transaction_id END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT st.transaction_id), 0)) AS refund_rate FROM merchants m JOIN silver_transactions st ON m.merchant_id = st.merchant_id WHERE st.quality_flag = 'PASS' AND st.transaction_date >= date_trunc('month', current_date - interval '1 year') AND st.transaction_date < date_trunc('month', current_date) AND st.status IS NOT NULL AND st.transaction_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name ORDER BY refund_rate DESC LIMIT 5;
